creator: fabian.freyer@physik.tu-berlin.de
text:
Created attachment 189764
Add USES=gmake and patch libunwind, fix man paths and pkg-plist, fix build for i386

Thanks for your work!

Unfortunately, your patch didn't apply for me, so I took the liberty to recreate it.

It seems the ABI part of the toolchain tuple is `netbsd` for x86_64, but `netbsdelf` on i386. I've fixed this too now.
